mapper.insert: INSERT INTO item_lots (item_id, lot_number, expiration_date) VALUES (#{itemId}, #{lotNumber}, #{expirationDate})
mapper.select: SELECT il.id, il.external_id, il.item_id, i.name AS item_name, il.lot_number, il.expiration_date, il.created_at FROM item_lots il JOIN items i ON il.item_id = i.id WHERE il.id = #{id}

SELECT s.external_id AS stock_external_id, s.serial_number, s.status, s.is_kept, s.created_at, sp.name AS space_name, sh.name AS shelf_name, b.name AS box_name FROM stocks s JOIN item_lots il ON s.lot_id = il.id JOIN items i ON il.item_id = i.id JOIN spaces sp ON s.space_id = sp.id LEFT JOIN shelves sh ON s.shelf_id = sh.id LEFT JOIN boxes b ON s.box_id = b.id WHERE il.external_id = #{externalId} AND i.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY s.created_at, s.id
